overall_summary: Technical focus is split between optimizing the core Eliza framework's database performance and the active development of 'milaidy', a Mac-native application. Simultaneously, the project faces severe community tension regarding token delistings in Korea and significant price declines.
key_facts: A critical database bottleneck was identified in the PostgreSQL logs table, causing delays in Eliza response times.
The 'milaidy' project launched as a Mac-native Eliza version based on OpenClaw architecture.
PR #6485 was opened to implement next-generation multi-language support for Rust, Python, and TypeScript.
ElizaOS is scheduled for delisting from three Korean exchanges on February 8 at 3:00 PM KST.
A missing MAX_EMBEDDING_TOKENS constant in recent plugin versions is causing integration failures.
PR #6476 was merged to provide comprehensive optimization and robustness improvements to the bootstrap plugin.
The Twitter plugin currently fails to perform native quote reposts, defaulting to text-plus-link formatted posts.
Stan confirmed a major database optimization plan is in development to address PostgreSQL load issues.
open_questions: Would milaidy support the examples from elizaos? Or do we need to run both Eliza and milaidy for full functionality?
Did anyone put milaidy on a VPS? or running it locally only?
Will team launch any token use-case or product which may use ElizaOS token?
What about 5 products this team was about to deliver in few weeks - months gone?
Do you even have a marketing team?

new_issues_prs.title: feat: next generation multi-language Eliza with Rust, Python and TypeScript support
new_issues_prs.author: lalalune
new_issues_prs.significance: Major architectural shift to support multiple programming languages and core package extensions.

new_issues_prs.title: feat(plugin-bootstrap): comprehensive optimization and robustness improvements
new_issues_prs.author: odilitime
new_issues_prs.significance: Significant performance optimization modifying 30 files and implementing robust architectural improvements.

new_issues_prs.title: feat: ActionFilterService — vector search + BM25 reranking
new_issues_prs.author: lalalune
new_issues_prs.significance: Reduces prompt bloat by dynamically filtering actions based on relevance.

overall_focus.claim: Development is centered on hardening security via multi-tenant privacy features, implementing request context for per-user settings, and transitioning to a more logic-based architectural system.

discord_updates.summary: Discussions focused on milaidy integration, specifically plugin compatibility and character configuration bugs. Architecture proposals for using PM2 for process management were introduced.
Critical identification of PostgreSQL performance degradation caused by excessive hits to the logs table. Stan confirmed an optimization plan is underway.
High community frustration regarding the token price drop to $0.0013 and delistings on Korean exchanges. Concerns were raised about project transparency and missing deliverables.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Users report that agents are defaulting to the 'eliza' personality regardless of custom configuration files, indicating a bug in character initialization.
Community members are questioning the lack of a staking mechanism for $ELIZAOS and asking for updates on the promised 5-product roadmap.

strategic_insights.insight: The introduction of the 'milaidy' brand for the Mac app has triggered strategy debates regarding whether separate branding dilutes the ElizaOS core network effect.
implications_or_questions: Should 'milaidy' be rebranded as a core Eliza product to consolidate brand equity?

strategic_insights.insight: Database architecture (specifically the log table) has become a primary bottleneck for agent responsiveness, potentially hindering retail adoption if not solved prior to further scaling.
implications_or_questions: Does the planned optimization address the root cause or is a more distributed DB approach required?

market_analysis.observation: ELIZAOS token price dropped to $0.0013 with delistings confirmed on three major Korean exchanges.
market_analysis.relevance: Significant loss of liquidity and negative community sentiment may impact funding or project longevity if the trend continues.
